name: pr_wl_x3_reentry_lone
drl: rule W when accumulate( E0(tag == "z", $v : v) over window:length(2); $s : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: D-185 detach-arm discriminator (oracle 3x, both window kinds agree; the time twin was landed-surface green pre-port): a LONE alpha re-entry of a previously-admitted (detached) member does NOT re-fold ([3,2,7] — no fire at the re-entry epoch); revival is MASK-GATED. The x85/sr4 're-occupation' reading was mechanically wrong (right observables by seed luck) — corrected in model_winlen (detach-state semantics) before the port.
